lights.note: Barrina T5 strips (~2–6 in canopy), Spider Farmer SF300 (~8 in above DWC), Spider Farmer SF600 (~12 in). All on one Hue schedule.

notes.indoorPermanent: DWC and herbs are permanent indoor.
notes.outdoorContainers: Lettuce, tomatoes, soil peppers, superhots, and bonsai are container plants and can use hardening guidance.
notes.bonsai: Training is TBD. Treat current bonsai entries as seedlings/young starts.
